name: Jerry Lewis' Italian Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the chicken in oil in a large skillet or Dutch oven. Add tomatoes, onion, green pepper, garlic, and seasoning. Simmer for about 5 minutes.
2. Pour into a large casserole dish. Heat oil in the same skillet. Add rice and stir until rice is golden brown. Add to the chicken.
3. Cover with water and bake at 350°F oven for approximately 1 1/2 hours or until chicken is tender and rice is cooked.
4. Add the olives, pimentos, and peas. Bake an additional 15 minutes and serve.
